 049:     double[:] scores,
 050:     double[:] confidences,
 051:     double[:] weights,

 053:     int n_bootstrap
 054: ):
 055:     """
 056:     Fast bootstrap confidence interval estimation.
 057: 
 058:     Parallelized with OpenMP for maximum performance.
 059: 
 060:     Args:
 061:         scores: Tool scores (0.0-1.0)
 062:         confidences: Tool confidences (0.0-1.0)
 063:         weights: Tool weights (sum to 1.0)
 064:         prior: Prior probability (default 0.5)
 065:         n_bootstrap: Number of bootstrap samples (default 1000)
 066: 
 067:     Returns:
 068:         (ci_lower, ci_upper) - 95% confidence interval
 069: 
 070:     Performance:
 071:         Python: ~500-1000ms
 072:         Cython: ~10-20ms
 073:         Speedup: 50x

PyDoc_STRVAR(__pyx_doc_5zones_15z07_data_access_5demeo_21_bayesian_fusion_core_2fuse_predictions_fast, "fuse_predictions_fast(double[:] scores, double[:] confidences, double[:] weights, double prior) -> double\n\nFast Bayesian fusion of tool predictions.\n\nAlgorithm:\n    P(rescue | tools) = prior \303\227 \342\210\217(tool_i likelihood)\n\nArgs:\n    scores: Tool scores (0.0-1.0)\n    confidences: Tool confidences (0.0-1.0)\n    weights: Tool weights (sum to 1.0)\n    prior: Prior probability\n\nReturns:\n    consensus_score (0.0-1.0)\n\nPerformance:\n    Python: ~5-10ms\n    Cython: ~0.5-1ms\n    Speedup: 10x");

 125: ) nogil:
 126:     """
 127:     Fast Bayesian fusion of tool predictions.
 128: 
 129:     Algorithm:
 130:         P(rescue | tools) = prior × ∏(tool_i likelihood)
 131: 
 132:     Args:
 133:         scores: Tool scores (0.0-1.0)
 134:         confidences: Tool confidences (0.0-1.0)
 135:         weights: Tool weights (sum to 1.0)
 136:         prior: Prior probability
 137: 
 138:     Returns:
 139:         consensus_score (0.0-1.0)
 140: 
 141:     Performance:
 142:         Python: ~5-10ms
 143:         Cython: ~0.5-1ms
 144:         Speedup: 10x
 145:     """
 146:     cdef:
 147:         int i, n_tools
 148:         double posterior, likelihood, contribution
 149: 
+150:     n_tools = scores.shape[0]

+151:     posterior = prior

 152: 
 153:     # Bayesian update loop

    __pyx_v_i = __pyx_t_3;

 155:         # Likelihood = score weighted by confidence

 160: 
 161:         # Multiplicative update
